h:head.h:title: (2025 April) - 1. PRETAS LF Site & participant Form V2

text.value: You just entered a value that will end the survey for this participant. Please go to the next page.
GPS coordinates are easier to collect outside. 2 min timeout
Participants lower than 5 years of age are not allowed.
Participant ID: Please scan the QR Code
date and time the recorder starts to fill the form
The text is too long. It mys not exceed 255 caracters
Enter the number of participants for this Community/Village
If you are the only recorder on your team, this may be called a "team ID". Recorder ID is the 2-digit code assigned to you or your team.
How many years has the respondent lived in the area?
Number of MDA rounds for LF (Ivermectin and Albendazole)
This barcode/QR Colde is already entered
The value must not be greater than the age
Does the Community/Village leader consent to participating in this survey?
Please enter the other site name
You just entered a value that will end the survey
Number of MDA rounds for Oncho (Ivermectin)
date and time the recorder starts to fill the form
